overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in western attire walking along a dirt path through grasslands toward a wooden farmstead with windmill. A horse rider passes by in the early part of the clip. The weather is overcast with dark storm clouds covering the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie path with distant farm structures

events.description: horse rider passes from right to left on the dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through tall grass, approaching the distant farm

notable_agents.action: riding a brown horse from right to left, passing the character on the path

entered.detail: tall green grass and wildflowers surrounding the dirt path on both sides
muddy trail with wagon ruts cutting through the grassland
tall metal windmill with spinning blades against the cloudy sky
rocky mountain peaks partially obscured by storm clouds
large red wooden barn with green doors and weathered roof
cluster of deciduous trees on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through open grasslands under an overcast sky. A horse rider passes by from right to left. In the distance, a wooden barn and windmill are visible against the backdrop of mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching farmstead with windmill and outbuildings

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path toward the farm buildings, maintaining a steady pace

entered.detail: small wooden shed with sloped metal roof adjacent to the main barn

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the grassland as the farmstead grows larger in view. The windmill shifts to the right side of the frame while the wooden barn becomes more prominent ahead. A small shed becomes visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmstead courtyard approach with windmill and barn

agents.ego_description: approaching the wooden barn and farm structures, now clearly visible in the near distance

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence posts and rails lining the left side of the path
wooden wagon with spoked wheels parked near the shed

segments.scene_description: The character nears the farmstead, with the wooden barn now dominating the center view and details like fence posts and a farm wagon becoming visible. The windmill recedes to the right background as the path leads directly toward the main barn structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through open grasslands that gradually closes in on a rustic farmstead under a heavy, overcast sky. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail as a horse rider passes by, with a distant barn and windmill framed against a backdrop of mountains. As the character advances, the farmstead grows larger in view, shifting the windmill toward the right of the frame while a small shed emerges from the grass. The scene then narrows its focus as the path leads directly toward the main barn structure, which begins to dominate the center of the view. Finally, the camera draws close enough to reveal fine details of the property, including fence posts and a farm wagon, as the windmill recedes into the right background.
